title: TPSO seeks missing Slidell woman
description: Tangipahoa Parish Sheriff’s Office is asking for the public’s help locating a woman who walked away from a local rescue and recovery center and could be in distress.

title: Factbox-The 1996 incident at the root of expected Raul Castro indictment
description: May 15 (Reuters) - The Trump administration plans ⁠to unveil criminal charges against Cuba's former president, Raul Castro, based on a 1996 incident ⁠in which Cuban military jets killed four people, according to a U.S. Justice Department ‌official who spoke on condition of anonymity.

title: Alta Vista Elementary named a 2026 National Gold Star School
description: CHEYENNE – Alta Vista Elementary was recently named a 2026 National Gold Star School by the National Association of Elementary School Principals (NAESP), a national recognition honoring schools that demonstrate outstanding leadership, innovation and dedication to student success.

title: Natuzzi Filed Its Annual Report on Form 20-F With the SEC
description: SANTERAMO IN COLLE, Bari, Italy--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #NATUZZI--NATUZZI FILED ITS ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 20-F WITH THE SEC

title: Gwyneth Paltrow celebrates ‘ultimate dream girl’ Apple Martin on her 22nd birthday
description: Gwyneth Paltrow shared a heartfelt tribute as her daughter marked her 22nd birthday with a major career milestone and recent graduation

title: Man charged in Orangeburg shooting - second person accused of driving suspect
description: Two roommates are facing charges following a gas station shooting incident that occurred on May 3 outside of Dodge’s in Orangeburg.

title: Turbine setbacks fall short
description: Another session passed with no agreement on wind turbine setbacks as new language fell flat in the Oklahoma House Thursday before the chambers adjourned sine die.

title: In April, Stanford outspends the field, and Rabb has the most cash on hand
description: (The Center Square) – Continuing the trend from the first quarter, state Rep. Chris Rabb, D-Philadelphia, raised the most of the candidates hoping to succeed U.S. Rep. Dwight Evans for the 3rd Congressional District in April. Rabb’s campaign raised just over $200,000 from April 1 through April 29, according to campaign finance reports released last [...] The post In April, Stanford outspends the field, and Rabb has the most cash on hand appeared first on The Black Chronicle .

title: Taxi services struggling amid high gas prices
description: All kinds of industries are feeling the squeeze from high gas prices, including taxi companies.

title: College softball: Pfeiffer stays alive in regional with 13-0 romp
